main_button_text.description: Text on the main entry button injected near README title

open_full_reader.description: Button text for opening the full-screen reader tab

full_reader_unavailable.message: Full reader is available after the document loads.
full_reader_unavailable.description: Tooltip shown before full reader can open

extension_context_invalidated.message: Extension was reloaded. Refresh this GitHub page to use full reader.
extension_context_invalidated.description: Tooltip shown when an old content script remains after extension reload

refresh_page_to_reopen.description: Button text shown when the extension context was invalidated

panel_title.description: Title shown in the panel header

back_to_toc.description: Link text to return from reading view to TOC

footer_site_link.description: Link text for the product website

loading_message.description: Shown while fetching and rendering Markdown

toc_section_count_one.description: Shown when exactly one heading is detected

toc_section_count.description: Shows how many headings were detected. Placeholder: $count$

toc_empty_title.message: This document has no clear sections.
toc_empty_title.description: Shown when the TOC is empty

toc_empty_hint.message: Switch to the “Read” tab to view the full text.
toc_empty_hint.description: Hint shown below the empty-TOC message

toc_untitled.description: Fallback text for headings that have no text

error_title_unavailable.message: Can’t read this page right now
error_title_unavailable.description: Generic error title when content cannot be fetched

error_title_empty.message: This file appears to be empty
error_title_empty.description: Error title when the Markdown content is empty

error_title_timeout.message: Loading is taking too long — retry?
error_title_timeout.description: Error title when a network request times out

error_title_network.description: Error title when a network error occurs

error_body_private.message: Private repos are not supported yet. You may also be rate-limited. Try again later.
error_body_private.description: Error detail for private repos or rate limiting

error_body_not_found.message: No readable Markdown content was found.
error_body_not_found.description: Error detail when the content is not found

action_retry.description: Button text to retry a failed load

fold_collapse.description: aria-label for collapse button on H2 headings

fold_expand.description: aria-label for expand button on H2 headings

error_cannot_identify.description: Error when the current URL does not match any supported page pattern
